commands: printf 'var http=require("http");var d=JSON.stringify({message:"my car wont start",vehicle:{year:"",make:"",model:""},history:[],mode:"casual",sessionId:"test_debug"});var r=http.request({hostname:"localhost",port:3001,path:"/api/diagnose",method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json","Content-Length":d.length}},function(res){var b="";res.on("data",function(c){b+=c});res.on("end",function(){try{var j=JSON.parse(b);console.log("CHECKS:",JSON.stringify(j.diagnostic&&j.diagnostic.checks));if(j.diagnostic&&j.diagnostic.checks){j.diagnostic.checks.forEach(function(c,i){var codes=[];for(var x=0;x<Math.min(c.length,10);x++)codes.push(c.charCodeAt(x));console.log("C"+i+" codes:["+codes+"] text:"+c)})}}catch(e){console.log("ERR",e.message,b.substring(0,200))}})});r.on("error",function(e){console.log("ERR",e.message)});r.write(d);r.end();' > /tmp/td.js && node /tmp/td.js
